name: part_003
file: tmp_【 #百鬼あやめ7周年新衣装3D 】百鬼あやめ７周年記念ライブ  ～天女繚華～ 【百鬼あやめ⧸ホロライブ】 [uRa-uLMea7w]_gemini-3-flash-preview/reencoded/part_003.mov

scenes.description: Nakiri Ayame and AZKi perform 'Hirahira Hirara' together on a traditional Japanese stage.
A cinematic transition showing a nighttime shrine setting with lanterns.
Nakiri Ayame begins her performance of 'Gokuraku Jodo' with backup dancers.

subtitles.original: あぁ 騒ぎ出した
subtitles.english: Ah, it's started to bustle

subtitles.original: 記憶浮かび 沈んでゆく
subtitles.english: Memories float up and sink away

subtitles.original: 沈んでゆく
subtitles.english: Sinking away...

subtitles.original: 思い出の破片 剥がれても
subtitles.english: Even if the fragments of memories peel off

subtitles.original: 光る鱗で隠すの
subtitles.english: I hide them with shining scales

subtitles.original: 眩いほどに 美しい
subtitles.english: Dazzlingly beautiful

subtitles.original: ひらひらひらら ひらひらひらら
subtitles.english: Fluttering, fluttering...

subtitles.original: 瞼の裏 暗闇に浮かぶ桜
subtitles.english: Cherry blossoms floating in the darkness behind my eyelids

subtitles.original: 水面に落ちたら 君は
subtitles.english: Once they fall onto the water's surface, you...

subtitles.original: もう一度咲くのかな
subtitles.english: Will you bloom once more?

subtitles.original: サヨナラしたら 会えないのでしょうか
subtitles.english: If we say goodbye, will we never meet again?

subtitles.original: 言えないままの気持ちだけが
subtitles.english: Let only the feelings left unsaid...

subtitles.original: 花びら浮かんだ 桜の橋になれ
subtitles.english: Become a bridge of cherry blossoms with floating petals

subtitles.original: 当たり前の景色が
subtitles.english: The ordinary scenery...

subtitles.original: ひらひらと舞い 音もなく消えてく
subtitles.english: Flutters and dances, disappearing without a sound

subtitles.original: 細い雨に 濡れた想いが
subtitles.english: Feelings drenched in the fine rain...

subtitles.original: 霞んでゆく
subtitles.english: Are becoming hazy

subtitles.original: 他の誰かに向けた笑顔に
subtitles.english: At the smile directed towards someone else...

subtitles.original: 忘れた日々も蘇る
subtitles.english: Forgotten days also return

subtitles.original: 色のない夜を 染めてゆく
subtitles.english: Coloring the colorless night

subtitles.original: 君と出会った 去年の春と
subtitles.english: Last year's spring when I met you...

subtitles.original: 同じ場所で同じ景色見つめてた
subtitles.english: I was staring at the same scenery in the same place

subtitles.original: 咲き誇るほどに 痛む
subtitles.english: It hurts as much as they bloom in full glory

subtitles.original: 君がいない桜
subtitles.english: The cherry blossoms without you

subtitles.original: 生まれ変わって また咲くのでしょうか
subtitles.english: Will they be reborn and bloom again?

subtitles.original: 戻れない場所と知りながら
subtitles.english: While knowing it's a place I can't return to

subtitles.original: 散り行く花びら 手のひらにのせて
subtitles.english: Placing the falling petals on my palm

subtitles.original: 花明かりに 誘われて
subtitles.english: Enticed by the glow of the blossoms

subtitles.original: 胸の中に降り積もる
subtitles.english: They pile up inside my chest

subtitles.original: 光と影 舞い散る吹雪の
subtitles.english: A fluttering blizzard of light and shadow

subtitles.original: 思い出だけ白く染めてゆく
subtitles.english: Dyeing only the memories in white

subtitles.original: ひらひらひらら ひらひらひらら
subtitles.english: Fluttering, fluttering...

subtitles.original: 瞼の裏 暗闇に浮かぶ桜
subtitles.english: Cherry blossoms floating in the darkness behind my eyelids

subtitles.original: 水面に落ちたら 君は
subtitles.english: Once they fall onto the water's surface, you...

subtitles.original: もう一度咲くのかな
subtitles.english: Will you bloom once more?

subtitles.original: サヨナラしたら 会えないのでしょうか
subtitles.english: If we say goodbye, will we never meet again?

subtitles.original: 言えないままの気持ちだけが 花びらに変わっても
subtitles.english: Even if only the feelings left unsaid turn into petals

subtitles.original: 君と出会った 去年の春と
subtitles.english: Last year's spring when I met you...

subtitles.original: 同じ場所で同じ景色見つめてた
subtitles.english: I was staring at the same scenery in the same place

subtitles.original: 咲き誇るほどに 痛む
subtitles.english: It hurts as much as they bloom in full glory

subtitles.original: 君がいない桜
subtitles.english: The cherry blossoms without you

subtitles.original: 夢の中でも 花が散ってゆく
subtitles.english: Even in my dreams, the flowers are scattering

subtitles.original: 暗闇に浮かんだ桜が 水面に落ちたら また会えるのかな
subtitles.english: If the cherry blossoms in the dark fall on the water, will we meet again?

subtitles.original: 極楽浄土
subtitles.english: Gokuraku Jodo

subtitles.original: 作詞：MARiA 作曲：toku
subtitles.english: Lyrics: MARiA Composition: toku
